title: Squirrel Removal in Kips Bay, Manhattan | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Kips Bay, Manhattan. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Serving residential & commercial properties. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Kips Bay property can cause significant damage to attics, wiring, and building structures. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout the Kips Bay neighborhood, from the historic brownstones near Lexington Avenue to the high-rise buildings along Third Avenue. Our humane removal methods ensure squirrels are safely extracted and prevented from returning to your Manhattan property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in urban wildlife management with over 15 years of experience serving Kips Bay residents and businesses. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in Manhattan buildings and provide guaranteed solutions with same-day service availability throughout the neighborhood.
localContext: Kips Bay's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, modern residential towers near NYU Langone Health, and tree-lined streets create ideal conditions for squirrel activity. The proximity to parks and the neighborhood's mature trees mean squirrels frequently seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and building facades, especially during colder months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Kips Bay?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Kips Bay typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Kips Bay apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Kips Bay buildings through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps in building facades, uncapped chimneys, and openings around utility lines. Older pre-war buildings are especially vulnerable due to architectural gaps that develop over time.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane in NYC?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, legal methods compliant with New York State wildlife regulations. Our approach includes live trapping when necessary, one-way exclusion doors, and relocation according to local guidelines, ensuring squirrels are removed without harm.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Kips Bay property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Kips Bay and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the situation, followed by exclusion work to prevent re-entry.
